mocks.description: Hand-authored registry.generated.ts stub (real working impl, manually maintained) stands in for the S3 codegen-emitted registry.
mocks.resolution_note: app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs now generates and commits app/src/themes/registry.generated.ts from the app/src/themes/*/manifest.ts folder set; the file is regenerated (byte-identical on a clean checkout) and its --check mode is idempotent, confirmed via both a manual CLI run and an automated themes-validation.test.ts regression test (AC-STRUCT-3). The observable contract (AppThemeName union, APP_THEMES Record, THEME_FONTS array) is unchanged from the S2 stub.
